Recent NEWS from ARDES

Recent NEWS from ARDES

International Collaborations and Academic Support Activities

ARDES has initiated an

institutional collaboration with Shandong University

, focusing on joint publications, coordinated project applications, and sustained scholarly exchange. In this context,

eight letters of collaboration intent

have been sent to Shandong University.

With the support of the

University Rectorate

, ARDES has also launched calls for

academic book and edited volume projects

through structured coordination with internationally recognized publishers, including

Peter Lang

, thereby strengthening international engagement and academic visibility. As a result,

13 book proposals

have been received.

In addition, ARDES has provided

24 proofreading supports

for academic manuscripts, and

have received

one-to-one consultancy

on publication strategy and journal targeting.

Complementing these initiatives, Doğuş University operates an

for research support and incentive applications, ensuring

transparent and standardized evaluation processes

.

Paylaş
